info.name: sgroups.io API Smoke Tests
info.description:
CRUD + selector + error-handling + immutability + namespace-isolation + delete-collection smoke tests for sgroups.io custom API server via kubectl proxy.

Requires `kubectl proxy --port=8001` running.

item.name: Pre-cleanup
item.description: Idempotent cleanup of leftover resources from previous runs. Accepts both 200 (deleted) and 404 (already gone).

exec: pm.test('Our tenant is in list', () => pm.expect(found).to.be.true);
pm.test('Our AG is in list', () => pm.expect(found).to.be.true);
const found = body.items.some(ag => ag.metadata.name === pm.variables.get('agName') && ag.metadata.namespace === pm.variables.get('namespace'));
pm.test('Our AG is in cross-namespace list', () => pm.expect(found).to.be.true);

item.name: Namespace Lifecycle
item.description: Verifies namespace deletion completes when namespace contains custom resources. The namespace must NOT get stuck in Terminating — this validates WatchList BOOKMARK support.

exec: // Delay 1s between polling attempts via pm.sendRequest to a slow endpoint
pm.test('Namespace fully deleted (not stuck in Terminating)', () => {
// Namespace still exists — retry (phase is likely Terminating)
pm.test('Namespace deleted within 30s (not stuck in Terminating)', () => {

item.name: Cleanup
item.description: Delete ALL resources created during the test run. Uses DeleteCollection for AGs and removes all known tenants.
